content.text:
Here's your WordPress version update summary across local sites:

---

## WordPress Version Summary — Local Sites

**Latest detected:** `7.0-beta6` (pre-release — 3 sites)
**Index freshness:** ⚠️ 52 days stale — numbers below reflect cached data, not current state

---

### Sites on 7.0 pre-release (but behind 7.0-beta6)
These are on beta/RC builds — likely dev/test sites:

| Version | Sites |
|---|---|
| 7.0-RC2 | cli-target, nexus-e2e-test, testjpp1, testjppdev, jppblank (×2) |
| 7.0-RC2-62241 | another-test, nexustestsite1 |
| 7.0-RC1 | The Curated Shelf |
| 7.0-RC1-62112 | nexus-test-site |

---

### Sites on stable 6.x — Significantly behind

| Version | Count | Notable sites |
|---|---|---|
| **6.9.4** | 64 | heath.biz, frostscape, benfischer, elasticapidev, Faker Incorporated, many test/eval sites |
| **6.9.1** | 20 | newsroom-admin-columns-poc, my-site, jppblankdev |
| **6.9** | 6 | wp-archaeologist, cli-test, hello-wp-engine |
| **6.8.3** | 3 | nitropack-2, wp-events-analyzer, pm-toolkit-hub |
| **6.8.2** | 1 | offload-media-clean |
| **6.8.1** | 6 | **jeremypollock.blog**, nexus, mu-plugin, wave, spanishsummertrip, FamilyFourSpanishTour |
| **6.8** | 1 | simulator |
| **6.4.3** | 1 | Faker Incorporated |
| **6.3.2** | 1 | faker-incorporated |
| **6.2.2** | 1 | e2e-test-fresh |

**227 additional sites** have no version data (SSH access required to read WP version).

---

### Priorities

1. **jeremypollock.blog** — looks like a real site on 6.8.1, three major point releases behind
2. **heath.biz, frostscape, elasticapidev** — on 6.9.4, may be production-adjacent
3. The bulk of the outdated sites are test/e2e/eval clones — lower urgency

**Recommended next step:** Run `reindex_site` on your active non-test sites to get fresh data before acting on this — the 52-day-old index means some of these may already be updated.
